positive: A highly stylized, maximalist jungle portrait featuring bioluminescent flora, deep sapphire blue and emerald green color palette, and intricate gold line work. The main subject is a majestic, silhouetted jungle cat (like a jaguar or ocelot) caught in a peaceful, contemplative pose, surrounded by giant, detailed ferns and vibrant exotic flowers. The composition should be circular and highly symmetrical, designed for a central print placement. Use cross-hatching and engraved nature-art elements. Studio lighting, deep shadows, strong contrast, vector illustration quality, perfect for apparel sublimation print, intricate detail, clean line art, highly decorative, trending on ArtStation.
